data.title: Tether (USDT) surpasses 400 million users, confirms CEO Paulo Ardoino
data.description:
Tether’s USDT stablecoin has surpassed 400 million users globally, according to CEO Paolo Ardoino. In a recent post on X, Ardoino announced this milestone while emphasizing the company’s adoption from the bottom up. He said that they’ve always concentrated on the adoption from the ground up, working in the streets, among other people, while traditional […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-surpasses-400m-users-confirms-ceo/

data.title: $5,000 in Cash Waiting for Americans Willing To Move To This Small Town: Report
data.description:
American families are eligible to receive thousands of dollars for free as long as they’re willing to move off the beaten path. Dozens of towns in states like Indiana, Kentucky, and Mississippi are luring in Americans sick of the soaring cost of living in big American cities with cash bribes, Fortune reports.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/27/5000-in-cash-waiting-for-americans-willing-to-move-to-this-small-town-report/

data.title: GameStop wipes out $3B in market cap as stockholders question Bitcoin plan
data.description:
GameStop shed nearly $3 billion in market capitalization on March 27 as investors second-guessed the videogame retailer’s plans to stockpile Bitcoin (BTC), according to data from Google Finance.  On March 26, GameStop tipped plans to use proceeds from a $1. 3 billion convertible debt offering to buy Bitcoin — an increasingly popular strategy for public companies looking to boost share performance.  GameStop’s announcement came a day after it proposed building a stockpile of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and US dollar-pegged stablecoins
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/gamestop-loses-3b-market-cap-investors-bitcoin-buys?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BlackRock’s Global Allocation Fund raises Bitcoin exposure by 1,810% over 12 months
data.description:
BlackRock’s Global Allocation Fund increased its exposure to Bitcoin (BTC) through its spot exchange-traded fund, iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), by roughly 1,810% since the ETF was launched in January 2024. According to a filing submitted to the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on March 2, the fund held 821,664 shares of IBIT as of Jan.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/blackrocks-global-allocation-fund-raises-bitcoin-exposure-by-1810-over-12-months/

data.title: FTX Founder SBF Shipped to Oklahoma via 'Con Air' After Unauthorized Jailhouse Interview
data.description:
The disgraced crypto mogul has landed at a prison transfer center less than a month after appearing on conservative commentator Tucker Carlson's show.
source: https://decrypt.co/312007/ftx-founder-sbf-shipped-to-oklahoma-via-con-air-after-unauthorized-jailhouse-interview

data.title: Cardano Price Ready For Surge? Analysts Predict Big Moves Ahead
data.description:
Cardano price movement is showing a breakout potential in the volatile cryptocurrency market. The crypto’s positive outlook stems from assessments based on both technical price indicators and basic market drivers that suggest a price increase may be possible.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/27/cardano-price-ready-for-surge-analysts-predict-big-moves-ahead/

data.title:
"Let me know when a significant company buys Bitcoin"

People forget Tesla and SpaceX hold Bitcoin.
GameStop (GME) Stock Falls Following $1,300,000,000 Bitcoin (BTC) Announcement
data.description:
GameStop (GME) shares are returning to normal levels today following an initial rally on the announcement of fundraising plans to buy Bitcoin (BTC). Yesterday, GameStop announced a proposed private offering of $1. 3 billion in convertible senior notes with plans to use the funds to purchase the crypto king
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/27/gamestop-gme-stock-falls-following-1300000000-bitcoin-btc-announcement/

data.title: Senator John Kennedy grills SEC nominee Paul Atkins about SBF pardon
data.description:
US Senator John Kennedy grilled prospective Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) chairman Paul Atkins about a potential pardon for Sam “SBF” Bankman-Fried during the Senate Banking Committee’s March 27 nomination hearing. The Louisiana Republican directed a series of questions about the former FTX CEO toward Atkins and probed the prospective SEC chairman about donations Bankman-Fried’s family made to Stanford University. Senator John Kennedy questions prospective SEC chairman Paul Atkins
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/senator-john-kennedy-grills-paul-atkins-sbf-pardon?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
